package rulecoverage

func PositiveGrpcUnaryInterceptorPerRpc() string {
    ruleID := "grpc_unary_interceptor_per_rpc"
    family := "library"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "interceptor/middleware construction inside RPC handler methods instead of at server setup"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
